_comment: Agent Machine capability radius examples — R0 (observe-only), R2 (local-execution), R4 (mesh-connected).

examples.label: observe-only
examples.description: Probe-only pod: reads hardware/runtime facts, emits health receipts. No writes, no network beyond probe endpoints.

examples.label: local-execution
examples.description: Local coding agent: reads/writes within declared workspace, may spawn subprocesses. No network.

examples.label: mesh-connected
examples.description: Reasoning pod with local steering + mesh routing. Restricted to declared local and mesh endpoints.
